description: Final phase of the sk-code parent conversion. Branch portion landed verified cleanup (8 harness-test migrations, parent-hub-vocab-sync generalization, CS-003 matcher, a 29-path smart_routing content-drift fix) plus two fold-broken live fixes; the load-bearing cutover (sk-code-review scorer removal, skill-graph regen + reindex, 4 alias-site deletions, ~350 NAME-ref repoints, version release) is specified as an atomic main-side advisor-rebuild runbook because the worktree lacks the compiled dist those steps require
